across.clue: Elastic is a rubber that stretches when it is pulled.
Renown is the quality of being well known due to having done good things.
A crystal is a piece of a solid substance that has a regular shape.
A pattern is a way in which something is done or organized.
annoyed because something is not happening as quickly as you want or in the way you want.
If someone is conscious of something, then they are aware of it.
A pillar is a tall, vertical structure used for support.
To observe something is to watch it.
To express a feeling or idea means to show others how one thinks or feels.
to fasten or join one thing to another

down.clue: Nature is everything in the physical world that is not made by people.
Popcorn is a snack made from heated corn kernels.
If someone is affluent, they are wealthy.
To believe that something is probably true based on your experience your knowledge and any other information that you have.
Empirical means involving scientific proof and evidence.
to climb something with difficulty using your hands and feet.
A lesson in which a small group of students discuss a subject with a tutor especially at a university or college.
A calorie is a unit of heat used to measure how much energy a food will produce.
Perhaps is used when you say that something could happen.
A basket is a container made of woven materials that is used to carry things.
